ptSource: No commercial PT chart published. R-1233zd(Z) is the cis-isomer of R-1233zd and has only research-grade measurement data; no Helmholtz EOS has been published for it. The commercially-used R-1233zd refers to the (E)-isomer (Honeywell Solstice ZD).

primarySources.citation: ASHRAE Standard 34-2022 distinguishes R-1233zd(E) (commercial, in Solstice ZD chillers) from R-1233zd(Z) (cis-isomer, research-only).
For commercial PT chart data of R-1233zd, see the (E)-isomer entry: Hulse, R.J. et al. (2012), "Physical Properties of HCFO-1233zd(E)", J. Chem. Eng. Data 57(12), 3581-3586. doi:10.1021/je300776s.
Limited measurements for R-1233zd(Z) appear in molecular-simulation and isomerization-equilibrium research literature; no commercial PT chart has been published as of 2026.

verifiedBy: NO COMMERCIAL DATA: R-1233zd(Z) does not have a published PT chart suitable for HVAC service reference. The (Z)-isomer is research-grade only; commercial R-1233zd applications use the (E)-isomer.
